post.description: Upload an image to the project associated with the API key.

get.description: List all active annotations for an image.

patch.description:
Modify an existing AI annotation (immutable pattern).

Creates a new annotation with the updated data and deactivates
the old one. Supports SAM and other refinement models.

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.
username.title: Username

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.
username.title: Username

APIKeyCreatedOutput.description:
Returned only at creation time — the one response that carries the
plaintext token. Shown to the caller exactly once.
APIKeyCreatedOutput.title: APIKeyCreatedOutput

ProjectAnnotationModifyOutput.description: Returned after modifying an annotation via the infer API.
ProjectAnnotationModifyOutput.title: ProjectAnnotationModifyOutput

ProjectImageAnnotationInput.description: Single annotation for a specific image (image_id comes from the URL).
ProjectImageAnnotationInput.title: ProjectImageAnnotationInput

ProviderOutput.description:
Provider representation for API responses.

Deliberately omits ``auth_secret``. ``has_auth_secret`` lets clients show
whether a credential is configured without exposing it. ``is_global`` is
true for admin-managed providers shared across projects.

inference_url.description: The service's base URL (e.g., https://infer.example.com). /predict will be appended by the platform.
inference_url.title: Inference Url

ProviderOutput.title: ProviderOutput

inference_url.description: The service's base URL (e.g., https://infer.example.com). /predict will be appended by the platform.
inference_url.title: Inference Url

ProviderUpdateInput.description: Partial update; all fields optional. ``auth_secret`` is write-only.

inference_url.description: The service's base URL (e.g., https://infer.example.com). /predict will be appended by the platform.
inference_url.title: Inference Url

ProviderUpdateInput.title: ProviderUpdateInput

RunOutput.description: A triggered auto-annotation run over a set of images (1..N).
RunOutput.title: RunOutput

AutoAnnotateInput.description:
Kick off an auto-annotation job for ALL images in the project.

The endpoint always targets every image in the project. If you need
to process only a subset, create a separate project for those images.
AutoAnnotateInput.title: AutoAnnotateInput

TaskOutput.description: One image's unit of work within a run.
TaskOutput.title: TaskOutput

ResultOutput.description: One candidate result the model returned for a single image.
ResultOutput.title: ResultOutput

TaskDetailOutput.description: Per-image task with its candidate results.
TaskDetailOutput.title: TaskDetailOutput

ImageAutoAnnotateInput.description:
Trigger server-driven inference for a single image asynchronously.

Creates a single-item ``InferenceJob`` and enqueues it for the background
worker, returning the job details immediately — same pattern as the batch
endpoint. Use ``GET /jobs/{job_id}`` to track progress and results.
ImageAutoAnnotateInput.title: ImageAutoAnnotateInput

inference_url.description: The service's base URL (e.g., https://infer.example.com). /session will be appended by the platform.
inference_url.title: Inference Url

public_url.description: Browser-reachable base URL for the frontend's direct predict calls, e.g. '/_interactive_infer' or 'https://host/_interactive_infer'. Empty when unset.
public_url.title: Public Url

inference_url.description: The service's base URL (e.g., https://infer.example.com). /session will be appended by the platform.
inference_url.title: Inference Url

public_url.description: Browser-reachable base URL for the frontend's direct predict calls, e.g. '/_interactive_infer' or 'https://host/_interactive_infer'. Blank => the platform falls back to the service handshake, then inference_url.
public_url.title: Public Url

InteractiveProviderUpdateInput.description: Partial update; all fields optional. ``auth_secret`` is write-only.

inference_url.description: The service's base URL (e.g., https://infer.example.com). /session will be appended by the platform.
inference_url.title: Inference Url

public_url.description: Browser-reachable base URL for the frontend's direct predict calls, e.g. '/_interactive_infer' or 'https://host/_interactive_infer'.
public_url.title: Public Url

InteractiveProviderUpdateInput.title: InteractiveProviderUpdateInput

InteractiveSessionStartOutput.description:
Session record plus the short-lived credential for the direct calls.

The frontend presents ``token`` in the ``token_header`` header on its direct
calls to the service — ``{predict_url}/{id}/infer_image`` (upload the image
once) and ``{predict_url}/{id}/predict`` (per prompt). ``token_expires_at`` is
the service-reported ISO-8601 expiry.
InteractiveSessionStartOutput.title: InteractiveSessionStartOutput

InteractiveSessionStartInput.description: Open an interactive session on an image (image_id comes from the URL).
InteractiveSessionStartInput.title: InteractiveSessionStartInput

InteractiveCommitInput.description:
Commit the user's chosen candidate as a real annotation.

In the direct-call flow the per-prompt loop runs browser -> service, so the
server never saw the intermediate steps; the frontend sends the final
prompts (for audit) plus the chosen geometry here. Exactly one geometry
field must match ``annotation_type``.
InteractiveCommitInput.title: InteractiveCommitInput

expires_at.description: When the export file should be cleaned up. None = system default (24h). Pass null explicitly for no expiry.
expires_at.title: Expires At
